properties.name: Angel's Landing Trail Corridor
properties.reason: Fragile cryptobiotic soil crust; off-trail access causes severe erosion

properties.name: The Narrows – Virgin River riparian zone
properties.reason: Sensitive aquatic habitat; wading disturbs macroinvertebrates

properties.name: The Wave – Coyote Buttes North
properties.reason: Permitting area; sandstone formation is irreplaceable and easily damaged by foot traffic

properties.name: Delicate Arch Viewpoint Closure Zone
properties.reason: Arch base rock is susceptible to spalling from human contact and thermal stress

properties.name: Zabriskie Point Badlands
properties.reason: Mudstone badlands easily eroded; off-trail footprints persist for decades

properties.name: Hoh Rainforest Ancient Grove
properties.reason: Old-growth nurse logs host rare bryophyte communities requiring zero compaction
